title: Intent/Compute spec
description: Desired compute infrastructure declared in Git (ADR-0058, realizing ADR-0055 G1/G4/G2). NOT an Entity (§1.2): the graph holds only what is BUILT; this declares what SHOULD exist. The reconcile compares this count against projected+correlated Entities and surfaces a GATED build (§5 Flow 1) — it never auto-launches. Landscape-agnostic: `builder` is the swap point; `params` is opaque, validated only against the builder's own input Contract (§1.5, never typed here — that would grow a per-provider ontology, §1.1). v2 adds optional `placement` (ADR-0059 decision 5).

count.description: Cardinality (G2): how many instances SHOULD exist. A typed field expanded by the reconcile — never a config-language loop (§1 non-goal).

namePrefix.description: Instance identities are namePrefix + ordinal (web -> web-01, web-02). Stable + idempotent: the reconcile correlates desired<->built by this name (stratt.intent/instance label). Exclusively claimed across Intents (§2.4).

projectKind.description: The Entity kind the built infra projects AS, so the fleet's Views select it (e.g. host). Carried on the build's Run-provenance projection or a relabel Normalizer — NEVER written by the reconcile (§1.2, decision 6).

labels.description: Selection labels stamped on the built Entity's projection (per-key owned, ADR-0041), e.g. {os: linux, role: web}.

builder.description: The build Action or Actuator ref (awsec2/create-vm | opentofu | vsphere | crossplane | ...). The landscape swap point (§1.4/§1.5); core learns no provider.

buildWorkflow.description: The GATED Workflow the operator launches to build a missing instance (Gate -> builder -> project-back). Referenced by the provisioning Finding; never auto-launched (§5 Flow 1).

params.description: Opaque build params passed to the builder, validated against ITS input Contract downstream (§1.5). Intent/Compute never types these — no per-landscape fields here (§1.1).

maxDelta.description: Optional §4.3 blast-radius fraction: if more than this fraction of `count` is missing in one reconcile, the batch PAUSES pending explicit approval instead of surfacing every build (never a silent fan-out). Defaults to the controller's absolute cap.

placement.description: Optional desired topology placement (ADR-0059 decision 5): the built unit's subnet + zone. A Relation cannot be declared in Git (§1.2), so placement's CaC home is the Intent; the build projects the placed-in edge (Run-provenance). Divergence from a built unit's OBSERVED placement raises a placement-drift Finding (§1.8) — never a silent reconcile edit.

subnet.description: The subnet Entity name the unit is placed in (an Intent/Subnet name) — a placed-in edge.

dmz.description: The dmz Entity name the unit sits in (an in-dmz edge). Distinct from availabilityZone (decision 3: no generic zone).

availabilityZone.description: The availability-zone Entity name the unit sits in (an in-az edge).
